AP2_F15.notes: Threaded optional _finite_mask kwarg through 9 residual fit kernels: _additive_residual_fit, _median_residual_fit, _y_quantile_clip_fit, _ratio_fit, _rolling_quantile_ratio_fit, _quantile_residual_fit, _monotonic_residual_fit, _ewma_residual_fit, _frac_diff_fit. When None (default), inner recomputes (back-compat). When supplied, inner reuses caller's mask -- saves redundant np.isfinite passes on hot composite-discovery loop. _diff_fit / _logratio_fit / _linear_residual_fit / _linear_residual_robust_fit / _linear_residual_multi_fit / _linear_residual_grouped_fit do not compute the isfinite-pair mask internally and were not modified. Outer dispatcher call-site threading deferred to a separate change (low-risk additive kernel-side change first; caller wiring is independent and can land when the discovery hot-path is touched next).

AP4_F1.notes: Added enable_crash_reporting_cfg axis (False, True) to AXES, FuzzCombo dataclass field, _build_combo wiring, _canonical_enable_crash_reporting() helper that collapses to False on non-Windows hosts, behavior_kwargs threading in test_fuzz_suite._suite_call_kwargs.

AP4_F2.notes: Sensor test_F2_polarsds_x_ltr_combo_is_reachable_and_distinct asserts the prefer_polarsds=True x target_type=learning_to_rank combo constructs and stays distinct from the False-polarsds variant in canonical_key (i.e. no accidental canon-collapse hiding the combo cell).

AP4_F5.notes: Added _canonical_pysr_enabled() helper invoked from canonical_key tuple. Collapses prep_ext_pysr_enabled_cfg=True to False when inject_inf_nan=True or inject_all_nan_col=True (PySR cannot consume non-finite values; the True/False variants are behaviour-identical in those combo cells).

AP4_F6.notes: Reachability sensor test_F6_composite_discovery_x_outlier_detection_reachable parametrised over outlier_detection in {lof, ocsvm}; asserts both attribute values survive _build_combo construction without canon collapse. Regression sensor against the 0-row-val cluster previously surfaced under w8c heartbeat.

AP4_F7.notes: Reachability sensor test_F7_baselines_off_x_diagnostics_on_combo_reachable asserts dummy_baselines_enabled_cfg=False x baseline_diagnostics_enabled_cfg=True constructs and stays distinct from the both-enabled variant (no canon-collapse). Live behaviour assertion (diagnostics auto-enables baselines OR raises) deferred to the existing --run-fuzz path which now exercises this combo.

green_paths: fuzz suite collect-only: 591 tests collected, no errors

commits.title: perf(composite_transforms): thread precomputed _finite_mask through 9 residual _fit kernels
test(fuzz): wire F1/F5 axes + F2/F6/F7 reachability sensors
